posts.author: Julietteb (Juliette )
posts.cookedHtml:
Be the first to know about the latest platform updates and uncover new features that will change the way you work.

This is the place to stay up to date on all new features that are fully released, gradually being released or in development! Our exclusive feature posts will provide you with an overview of our latest new features, best practices, and industry examples. The community team will be responsible for posting updates and announcements in this section for our community members to comment, ask questions, and discuss!
